title: Morning Note — 0406
html:
Morning Note — 0406

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: Headline mode is amplified while geopolitical ultimatums are looming within hours of expiration. Expect big bursts up in case of bombing delays, reprieves or demand compliance. To avoid short term damage, investors can use longer dated expiration dates.

+ SPX tracker: The S&P is facing resistance from the last few spikes on ultimatum delays. In turn, such resistance also offers opportunities if the bulls are willing to take them.
Levels: Resistance at 6639, 6688, 6712, and 6760. Support at 6508, 6456, 6398, and 6350.
- Short term lines: ES_F | SPX

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Key Talking Point:
— TODAY (Mon Apr 6) —
★ 13-Week Bill Auction [Treasury Auction] 11:30 AM
★ 26-Week Bill Auction [Treasury Auction] 11:30 AM
— TOMORROW (Tue Apr 7) —
★★★ Durable Goods (M3 Survey) [Econ Release]
★ 3-Year Note Auction [Treasury Auction] 01:00 PM
★ 6-Week Bill Auction [Treasury Auction] 11:30 AM
— WED APR 8 (Wed Apr 8) —
★★★ FOMC Minutes (from Mar 18 meeting) [Fed] 2:00 PM
★ 17-Week Bill Auction [Treasury Auction]
★ 9-Year 10-Month Note Auction [Treasury Auction] 01:00 PM
— THU APR 9 (Thu Apr 9) —
★★★ GDP [Econ Release]
★★★ Personal Income & Outlays (PCE) [Econ Release]
★★ Initial Jobless Claims [Econ Release]
★ 29-Year 10-Month Bond Auction [Treasury Auction] 01:00 PM
★ 4-Week Bill Auction [Treasury Auction]
★ 8-Week Bill Auction [Treasury Auction]
— FRI APR 10 (Fri Apr 10) —
★★★ CPI [Econ Release]
★★★ Durable Goods (M3 Survey) [Econ Release]

+ Earnings TABLE: Wed Apr 8: DAL RPM | STZ

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 885522)

Nic
